description: The Ministry of Health has launched a new 'Hospital Waste Management' initiative. As the DHIS2 Administrator (admin / district), configure the system to collect monthly data by creating two aggregate data elements: 'Waste Generated (kg)' (Short name: 'Waste Gen', Number, Sum) and 'Waste Incinerated (kg)' (Short name: 'Waste Incin', Number, Sum), using the default category combination. Create a monthly dataset named 'Hospital Waste Management' including these elements and assign it to 'Bo District' and all its sub-units. Record 150 for 'Waste Generated' and 120 for 'Waste Incinerated' for 'Bo Government Hospital' for January 2024 and mark the dataset as complete.
